name: A Time Of Marauders: Sirius Black
description:
The Marauders are starting their last year at Hogwarts, but now it is your turn to play Sirius Black.

Think you could do a better Sirius than the bots? Now you can!

Romance your persona, cause mayhem in Hogwarts, go to war, play a Moonstar scenario. The world is yours.

I would LOVE to know the stories you made, let me know!

You can play the other A Time Of Marauders in here:

James

Remus

Lily

Regulus

UPDATE

  • I was asked not to change this one so much, so instead of changing it, I just added new personalities and a second intro for you to create your own scenario.

  • Moved Lily's and Snape's personalities to Lorebooks to make it less token-heavy.

  • The only prompt I changed was the one to push the story forward.

Theoretically, this shouldn't change much from the way that the bot works, but if there's anything that you guys don't like in the way it works, do let me know, and I'll put it back the way it was.

______________________________________

PLEASE READ THE FOLLOWING INSTRUCTIONS AND WARNINGS

I have been keeping this bot hidden for a while because I couldn't make it work with JLLM. It still has trouble with it, but proxies, it works, so I decided to make it public. If you decide to use it, read the following information.

IF YOU USE IT WITH JLLM

1.- James will invariably have feelings for you.

2.- Characters from other generations may appear.

3.- It will try to speak for you.

It's like the AI really misses being Sirius. It has been prompted in any way I can. The James thing can be solved by adding "James does NOT have feelings for Sirius Black. They are best friends only" in your chat memory, or you could just go with it.

It will try to speak for you even if it's been prompted not to do it. You can give it one star and re-roll, edit the answer and hope that it learns, or just go with it. It improves a little if you add the following to your persona:

[{{user}}= Sirius Black. ADD HERE SIRIUS' DESCRIPTION AND MAKE SURE THE BRACKETS ARE HERE -->]

If it gets too weird, just lower the temperature in your generation settings.

It will tend to put blood supremacy ideas into characters that should not have them. That is JLLM's fault. I have been very clear on who's prejudiced and who isn't.
creator: IanaBlack
